hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); { echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE '\bgit( +[^ ]+)* +commit\b' && echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'co-authored-by:|generated with|noreply@anthropic|🤖' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Commit message contains a vanity trailer/header (Co-Authored-By, Generated with, or robot emoji). Per ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md: no vanity tags/trailers/headers. Remove it and retry."}}'; } || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { grep -qiE '\bgit( +[^ ]+)* +(commit|push)\b' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"State-changing git command detected in the command string (commit/push/pull/merge/rebase/reset/restore/checkout/switch/clean). Prefix-based ask rules miss compound or cd-led commands — confirm before running."}}'; } || true
hooks.statusMessage: Checking for global state-changing git commands

_comment_remoteControlAtStartup: This is a reminder. Actual setting lives in ~/.claude.json. See https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/54527
